evals.prompt: My Flutter app freezes when parsing a large JSON file. How do I fix it?
evals.expected_output: Large JSON parsing is CPU-bound and blocks the main isolate. Use Isolate.run() to offload the decoding to a worker isolate. Extract the parsing into a top-level function and await the result.

evals.prompt: When should I use async/await vs Isolate.run vs Isolate.spawn in Dart?
evals.expected_output: Use async/await for I/O-bound tasks (network, file). Use Isolate.run for one-off CPU-heavy tasks. Use Isolate.spawn with ReceivePort/SendPort for continuous background processing with bidirectional communication.

evals.prompt: My FutureBuilder keeps re-firing on every widget rebuild. What's wrong?
evals.expected_output: The future is being created inline in the build method, so it creates a new Future on every rebuild. Cache the future in initState or a late final field so the same instance is used across rebuilds.

assertions.description: Identifies inline future creation as the cause
